languages.text: "Лор-р-рд-капитан, здравия желаю! Я несу вахту и помогаю господам генеторам и хирургеонам с особо буйными пациентами. Боль не уходит, но я ношу ее как медаль — ничто больше не сломит мой дух".

traits.locale_text: "Лор-р-рд-капитан, здравия желаю! Я несу вахту и помогаю господам генеторам и хирургеонам с особо буйными пациентами. Боль не уходит, но я ношу ее как медаль — ничто больше не сломит мой дух".

languages.text: "Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."
languages.original_text: "Лор-р-рд-капитан, здравия желаю! Я несу вахту и помогаю господам генеторам и хирургеонам с особо буйными пациентами. Боль не уходит, но я ношу ее как медаль — ничто больше не сломит мой дух".

traits.locale_text: "Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

"Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

"Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

languages.text: 「ロルド・キャプテン、ご挨拶！私は番台を勤め、暴れん坊の患者をマスター・ジェネーターとマスター・サージュンの手助けで落ち着かせてきました。痛みは消えませんが、私はそれを勲章のように身につけます。今や私の精神は、何ものにも打ち砕かれません」
languages.original_text: "Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

traits.locale_text: 「ロルド・キャプテン、ご挨拶！私は番台を勤め、暴れん坊の患者をマスター・ジェネーターとマスター・サージュンの手助けで落ち着かせてきました。痛みは消えませんが、私はそれを勲章のように身につけます。今や私の精神は、何ものにも打ち砕かれません。」

languages.text: “舰、舰长大人，向您致敬！我一直在站岗，帮助基因士大师和船医大师处理那些更不守规矩的病人。我的疼痛并未消退，不过我现在视其为勋章——没有什么能击垮我的意志了。”
languages.original_text: "Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

traits.locale_text: “舰、舰长大人，向您致敬！我一直在站岗，帮助基因士大师和船医大师处理那些更不守规矩的病人。我的疼痛并未消退，不过我现在视其为勋章——没有什么能击垮我的意志了。”

languages.text: « Salutations, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Je monte la garde et j'aide les maîtres genetors et chirurgeons à maîtriser les patients agités. La douleur est toujours aussi vive, mais je la porte comme une médaille. À présent, plus rien ne peut briser mon esprit. »
languages.original_text: "Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

traits.locale_text: « Salutations, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Je monte la garde et j'aide les maîtres genetors et chirurgeons à maîtriser les patients agités. La douleur est toujours aussi vive, mais je la porte comme une médaille. À présent, plus rien ne peut briser mon esprit. »

languages.text: «¡Saludos, Lorrrd Capitán! He estado vigilando y ayudando a los amos genetores y los amos cirujanos con los pacientes más rebeldes. El dolor no desaparece, pero lo considero una medalla: ya nada puede doblegar mi espíritu».
languages.original_text: "Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

traits.locale_text: «¡Saludos, Lorrrd Capitán! He estado vigilando y ayudando a los amos genetores y los amos cirujanos con los pacientes más rebeldes. El dolor no desaparece, pero lo considero una medalla: ya nada puede doblegar mi espíritu».

languages.text: "Lorrrd Kaptan, selamlar! Nöbetimi tutuyor ve Üstat Genetörler ile Üstat Cerrahların daha asi hastalarla ilgilenmesine yardım ediyorum. Acı dinmiyor ama onu madalya gibi taşıyorum. Artık hiçbir şey ruhumu yıkamaz."
languages.original_text: "Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

traits.locale_text: "Lorrrd Kaptan, selamlar! Nöbetimi tutuyor ve Üstat Genetörler ile Üstat Cerrahların daha asi hastalarla ilgilenmesine yardım ediyorum. Acı dinmiyor ama onu madalya gibi taşıyorum. Artık hiçbir şey ruhumu yıkamaz."

languages.text: "Seid gegrüßt, Lorrrrd Captain! Ich habe Wache gehalten und den Meister-Genetoren und -Chirurgeums mit schwierigen Patienten geholfen. Der Schmerz lässt nach, aber ich trage ihn wie eine Medaille ... jetzt kann nichts mehr meinen Geist brechen."
languages.original_text: "Lorrrd Captain, greetings! I've been keeping my watch and helping the Master Genetors and Master Chirurgeons with the more unruly patients. The pain isn't fading, but I wear it like a medal — nothing can break my spirit now."

traits.locale_text: "Seid gegrüßt, Lorrrrd Captain! Ich habe Wache gehalten und den Meister-Genetoren und -Chirurgeums mit schwierigen Patienten geholfen. Der Schmerz lässt nach, aber ich trage ihn wie eine Medaille ... jetzt kann nichts mehr meinen Geist brechen."
